purpose: 30 frequently asked questions across 7 sections (General, Project Setup, Swarm Execution, Dashboard/Monitoring, Hooks/Validation, Configuration, Profiles/Commands). Covers !p_track vs !p, parallel vs serial execution, waves vs chains, tracker_root vs project_root, project setup, CLAUDE.md, PKI, parallel worker limits, mid-flight task addition, retries, failures, replanning, resume, dashboard updates, multi-dashboard, monitoring commands, cancellation, reset, archives, hooks, configuration storage, server timing, Live Preview, profiles, and command discovery.
gotchas: Hooks fail open by default; SYNAPSE_SKIP_SCHEMA=1 only bypasses validate-initialization-schema
Common dashboard-not-updating causes: wrong dashboard_id, validation rejection, server not running, stale browser cache
validate-archive-before-clear.sh enforces archival before progress file deletion
No hardcoded parallel worker limit -- bound by API rate limits and system resources
patterns: Q&A organized by topic with cross-references to common-issues.md
Decision-tree style guidance (when to use which command)
conventions: Cross-references to common-issues.md for error specifics
Multi-section organization: General, Project Setup, Swarm Execution, Dashboard, Hooks, Config, Profiles
